channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fly tipped black sacks full of nappies and rubbish, 3rd April
item.description:
The two black sacks dumped on the green have now been ripped open and the dirty nappies and rubbish is all around the road. Tuesday an electric road sweeper came down the road but did not clear up the sacks. The refuse collectors also left it. Can Greenwich council please arrange to clear this up as a matter of urgency. Thank you
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rancliffe Gardens, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Suitcase and sacks of rubbish dumped on Gallosson rd SE18, 3rd April
item.description:
As title, not sure how long it’s been here. Thank you

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Conway Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damaged car been left for weeks, 3rd April
item.description:
A black damaged bmw convertible has been left in a bay for a couple of weeks. The tyres are starting to deflate. Parking is limited down this road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wendover Way, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Repeated fly-tipping and littering in parking area off Briset Road, large amounts of cans and rubbish, 3rd April
item.description:
This location is being repeatedly used for fly-tipping and littering. Large quantities of waste including cans, bags, and general rubbish are regularly dumped across the parking bays, pavement, and surrounding vegetation. This is not an isolated incident — it is an ongoing and recurring problem that has been reported previously but has not been resolved. The waste continues to reappear shortly after being cleared, indicating no effective preventative measures are in place. The current situation is unacceptable, creating an unsanitary environment, attracting further dumping, and negatively impacting the area. This requires not only immediate clearance but also preventative action. Please implement measures such as increased monitoring, signage, enforcement, or CCTV to stop repeated fly-tipping at this location.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Briset Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pot hole, 3rd April
item.description:
Pot hole was repaired previously

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 45, Ashurst Road, Friern Barnet, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped rubbish blocking pavement, 3rd April
item.description:
Large quantity of dumped panels dumped on pavement of Licoln Green Road. This is a hazard for pedestrians due to the pavement being blocked. The exact loaction is adjacent to the east boundary of no. 5 Kedleston Drive.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lincoln Green Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Traffic sign hanging off on roundabout, 3rd April
item.description:
Traffic sign on roundabout loose and hanging. Wind blowing it into road. Will cause an accident. Located on gravel hill roundabout.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox on Downs Park Road, 3rd April
item.description:
Hi - there’s a dead fox in the trees / bushes of Downs Park Road diagonally opposite from entrance to the park (along the side of Andre Street). This is a potential risk to kids / dogs / cats that might stumble across it so needs clearing!
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Downs Park Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog from stables, 3rd April
item.description:
The German Shepherd belonging to the stables has been spotted several times and is allowed to roam freely in the park unattended. It fouls the footpath with no one cleaning up after it. Some children are nervous.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kydbrook Close, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Between 2 Donaldson and Brondesbury Road, 3rd April
item.description:
Dog mess needs cleaning up please

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rather shocked by all this dumped rubbish, 3rd April
item.description:
Some looks like it’s been here a while. Bags of household and food waste along with an old settee. Attracting vermin and blocking pavement access particularly for push and wheelchair users. I tripped over some of it. It’s all at kashgar and Ceres crossroads. Thank you

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Marmadon Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping outside 41-57 Attleborough Court, 3rd April
item.description:
Flytipping outside 41-57 Attleborough Court

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping next to bridge, 3rd April
item.description:
Yet more rubbish flytipped by the railway bridge. This time a large black bag of building waste and smaller bag of waste behind it. Happens about every two or three days in this same location. CCTV would catch lots of offenders!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Green Lane, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped rubbish beside flats, 3rd April
item.description:
Rubbish dumped on the pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Beatty Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sofa/futon flytipped, 3rd April
item.description:
Large white sofa dumped on the pavement on Maple Road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 140, Maple Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree blocking traffic signals, 3rd April
item.description:
Local council to cut back foliage located at pole 12 and directly straight ahead where RP2 is located
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Conington Road, Ladywell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Paint pot and bag of rubbish, 3rd April
item.description:
Dumped in a popular dumping place on Marmadon Road. Left here overnight. Thank you

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Marmadon Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Household items dumped, 3rd April
item.description:
Dumped here about a day ago. Just after other rubbish was cleared from this area.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hylton Street, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 3rd April
item.description:
Trampoline and fridge

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 25-40, St Helena Road, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Black sacks of rubbish, 3rd April
item.description:
Two black sacks of rubbish filled with food open and spilling out onto the street attracting vermin. At the junction of Brookedene and Hilton Road dumped overnight I think, thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brookdene Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet
